creator: sterling@camdensoftware.com
text:
For the Intel Integrated HD graphics on the HM55, it appears that
xf86-video-intel version 2.10.0 is needed (see here:
http://intellinuxgraphics.org/2009Q4.html).

What are the chances of getting that pushed ahead?  How can I help?

Regards,

--
